results.validation_notes: Deep context confirms Microservices but removes Event-Driven and DDD. Microservices is validated by multiple services (Auth, Storage) with separate Dockerfiles and Docker Compose orchestration. Event-Driven (heuristic score 0.6) has only 4 messaging signals in the entire codebase - no evidence of Kafka/RabbitMQ configs, event schemas, domain event classes, or pub/sub patterns. DDD (heuristic score 0.3) shows no structural evidence - no aggregates/, entities/, value-objects/, domain/ directories, no bounded context boundaries, and no repository pattern visible at depth 4. The services are domain-oriented but lack DDD tactical patterns.
